title: caladenia roei
intro: Caladenia roei, also known as the Donkey Orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid native to Western Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory qualities. The roots of the plant are said to have health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a valuable resource in traditional herbal medicine. Caladenia roei can be prepared into herbal remedies like infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
